name: Dominoes
recipeInstructions:
Cookies: Cream the butter and sugar together. Add the egg. Sift the flour, cocoa powder, and salt into the mixture and combine thoroughly. Knead the dough until smooth, then roll it out between two sheets of wax paper to form rectangles about 1 1/4 x 2 3/4 inches. Use a skewer to mark a line across each cookie. Bake on a greased baking sheet for 10-15 minutes, then cool on a wire rack.
Frosting: Soften the butter and beat in the powdered sugar until smooth. If needed, add a few drops of hot water to achieve the desired consistency. Add vanilla essence to taste. Sandwich cookies together with a small amount of frosting if desired. Decorate each cookie with dots (each should have a line across the middle) using a pastry bag fitted with a plain tip.
Yield: Approximately 14 domino-shaped cookies
